task_description: Create a complete Telegram bot for test/exam grading using OMR (Optical Mark Recognition). The bot generates printable answer sheets, scans filled sheets via photo, grades them, and exports results to Excel. Lightweight design for AWS free tier (under 120MB RAM).

verification.summary: All modules import successfully after review fixes. Sheet generator produces correct A4 image (2480x3508). Excel export generates valid xlsx. OMR scanner returns error on missing markers. Bot module loads with access control and conversation fixes. deploy.sh secures .env.
